title: Phone Login - Verify validation for phone number with less than 10 digits
description: Tests that the system shows an error for phone numbers shorter than 10 digits.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Enter a 9-digit number (e.g., '123456789') in the input field.
3. Observe the screen for an error message.

expected_result: An error message 'Invalid phone number' is displayed, and the user remains on the Login screen.
